entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A cool-season food legume studied for heat sensitivity

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: A cool-season food legume found to be more sensitive to heat stress than chickpea

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Exposure to high temperatures that inhibits growth and affects reproductive stages

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events including flowering, podding, and maturity

entities.name: PODDING
entities.description: The stage of pod formation in legumes

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The final stage of plant development

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: Total plant mass including shoots and roots

entities.name: POLLEN VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of pollen grains to remain alive and functional

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grain sprouting

entities.name: POLLEN TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the pollen tube towards the ovule

entities.name: STIGMA RECEPTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of the stigma to receive and support pollen

entities.name: MEMBRANE INJURY
entities.description: Damage to cellular membranes caused by heat and oxidative stress

entities.name: LEAF WATER STATUS
entities.description: The hydration level of the leaves under stress

entities.name: PHOTOCHEMICAL EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of light energy conversion during photosynthesis

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the leaves

entities.name: CARBON FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting inorganic carbon to organic compounds

entities.name: ASSIMILATION
entities.description: The process of incorporating carbon and nutrients into plant tissues

entities.name: OXIDATIVE STRESS
entities.description: An imbalance between the production of reactive oxygen species and antioxidant defenses

entities.name: PODS
entities.description: The fruit of the legume containing seeds

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total weight or quantity of seeds produced

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: An enzymatic antioxidant that declines under heat stress

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: An enzymatic antioxidant that declines under heat stress

entities.name: ASCORBATE PEROXIDASE
entities.description: An enzymatic antioxidant that declines under heat stress

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE REDUCTASE
entities.description: An enzymatic antioxidant that declines under heat stress

entities.name: NON-ENZYMATIC ANTIOXIDANTS
entities.description: Antioxidants that are not proteins and decline under heat stress

entities.name: RUBISCO ACTIVITY
entities.description: A measurement used to assess carbon fixation

entities.name: SUCROSE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: A measurement used to assess assimilation

entities.name: SUCROSE SYNTHASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: A measurement used to assess assimilation

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC ABILITY
entities.description: The overall capacity of the plant to perform photosynthesis, including carbon fixation and assimilation

entities.name: POLLEN FUNCTION
entities.description: The collective ability of pollen to achieve fertilization, including viability and tube growth

entities.name: OXIDATIVE DAMAGE
entities.description: Cellular injury caused by oxidative stress and membrane injury

relationships.description: inhibits growth and reduces yield more severely than in chickpea
accelerates the timing of podding and maturity
reduces viability, germination, and tube growth
increases membrane injury and oxidative stress
reduces the number of pods produced
